name: Damask Woven Persian with Fringe Rug - Threshold™
description:
The Damask Woven Persian Rug with Fringe from Threshold™ adds a pop of color and pattern to your abode. This Persian rug is adorned with an intricate damask motif in a rich multicolor palette for a sophisticated look. Complete with fringe edges for added flair, the woven rug goes nicely with matching furnishings for a cohesive look. Plus, the rectangular rug stands up against heavy traffic areas, thanks to its flat-pile construction.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
